title: Guardian Operator Allowlist (006-operator-authz)
description: JSON document accepted uniformly by GUARDIAN_OPERATOR_PUBLIC_KEYS_JSON (deploy → AWS Secrets Manager payload), GUARDIAN_OPERATOR_PUBLIC_KEYS_FILE (file on disk), and GUARDIAN_OPERATOR_PUBLIC_KEYS_SECRET_ID (AWS Secrets Manager). Each array element is either a legacy hex Falcon public key (read-only) or an object carrying an explicit permission set.

oneOf.description: Legacy element: hex-encoded Falcon public key. Treated as holding {dashboard:read} only.

permissions.description: Effective permission set for this operator. Empty array denies every authorization check.
